data.narrative:
Allen Control Systems is a Series A-stage Defense & Security company that has raised $42M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of 10 peers (2 public, 8 private) operating in the same sector and stage, including Scale AI, Stark Defence, Vatn Systems, and Ares Industries.

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis uses the $42M in total raised as a proxy for current value, applying a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A advancement to subsequent rounds, yielding $84M. Peer-median analysis examines valuations across the 4 same-sector, same-stage comparables, which range from $150M to $29.0B, with a median of $400M. This wide dispersion reflects heterogeneity in the Defense & Security peer set; the median is materially higher than the stage-progression result.

Triangulating these two methods produces a valuation range of $71M (low) to $460M (high), with a median of $242M. The wide spread between methods reflects uncertainty in peer selection and stage-progression assumptions. The peer-median approach carries elevated sensitivity to Scale AI's $29B valuation, an outlier that pulls the median upward. Stage-progression anchors conservatively to deployed capital. A point estimate would require resolution on whether Allen Control's competitive positioning and growth trajectory align more closely with the upper or lower quartile of the Defense & Security peer set.
